evidence: "I love this show, I still stay up till 2:00 in the mourning to see that show..."
"one of the best movies in the world, it was just so real you felt like you were there..."
"...nothing to rush out and buy, I'd strongly recomend renting this before buying it."
"...the only problem is, not enough people died..."
"This season is so funny it will make you sick..."
"...the best characters are Nina, Finch. Both of those are so funny it's unbelievable."
"...it was ok, but not great, nothing to rush out and buy..."
"...the only down grade is the little remixes in some of the songs..."
"...I thought this movie would be good but I thought this movie was one of the best Queen Latifah movies I ever saw..."
"...the singing was just perfect. This is truely a good show..."
"...the choreography and her sassy mouth in the song..."
"...the cast was funny and made you feel like you were right there in the shop..."

summary: The user enjoys comedy and drama, often favoring fast-paced narratives with engaging performances. They show a preference for light-hearted content that evokes laughter, while being less concerned about production quality or complex storytelling.
